scripts.release: rd /s /q dist .neutralino release 2>nul & vite build && copy backend\src\index.js build\backend-server.js && copy backend\package.json build\ && cd build && npm install && cd .. && neu update && neu build && copy build\package.json dist\miapp-desktop\ && xcopy build\node_modules dist\miapp-desktop\node_modules /E /I /Y && xcopy backend\src dist\miapp-desktop\src /E /I /Y && move dist\miapp-desktop\backend-server.js dist\miapp-desktop\src\index.js
scripts.release-windows: if exist dist rd /s /q dist & if exist .neutralino rd /s /q .neutralino & if exist release rd /s /q release & vite build && copy backend\src\index.js build\backend-server.js && copy backend\package.json build\ && cd build && npm install && cd .. && neu update && neu build
